name: Sun-Dried Tomato Tapenade on Polenta Triangles
recipeIngredient: 9 sun-dried tomatoes packed in oil, well-drained and coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
Polenta:
1. In a heavy medium saucepan, combine 1 1/4 cups whipping cream, 1 1/4 cups water, and 3/4 tsp salt.
2. Bring to a boil over high heat.
3. Gradually whisk in 2/3 cup yellow cornmeal until smooth.
4. Reduce heat to medium-low and stir until polenta is thick, about 10 minutes.
5. Mix in 1/4 tsp hot pepper sauce (Tabasco) and season with 1/4 tsp pepper.
6. Pour into an 8-inch square glass baking dish. Chill until cold, about 1 hour.
Tapenade:
1. Transfer the tapenade mixture to a small bowl.
2. Season with salt and pepper.
Polenta Triangles:
1. Cut polenta into 12 squares.
2. Cut each square in half diagonally, forming 24 triangles.
3. Heat 2 tablespoons olive oil in a heavy large non-stick skillet over high heat.
4. Working in batches, add polenta triangles and sauté until golden, adding more oil as necessary, about 2 minutes per side per batch.
5. Transfer polenta to paper towels to drain.
6. Divide tapenade among the triangles.
7. Arrange on a platter.
8. Garnish with parsley.
Serve at room temperature.
Yield: 24
